headings: Section 12. Applications for Payment, Releases, Lien-Free Project
text: - 12.2 As a condition of each payment hereunder, the Subcontractor shall furnish the Contractor with an original  Affidavit  of  Bills  Paid,  in  the  form  attached  hereto  as Exhibit 'F' and  incorporated  herein,  as  well  as original  conditional  progress  releases  and  waivers  of  lien,  in  the  form  attached  hereto  as Exhibit  'G-1' and incorporated  herein,  and  an  original  conditional  final  release  and  waiver  of  lien  in  the  form  attached  hereto  as Exhibit 'G-2' and incorporated herein at the time of final payment on this Subcontract, from Subcontractor, and each  of  its  materialmen  and  subcontractors  performing  work  on  the  Project.  In  addition  to  the  foregoing,  upon Subcontractor's receipt of payment for Subcontract Work, Contractor may request and Subcontractor shall promptly and within no more than seven (7) days deliver to Contractor original unconditional progress releases and waivers of lien, and original unconditional final releases and waivers of lien, in the forms attached hereto as Exhibit 'G-3' and Exhibit 'G-4' ,  respectively, from Subcontractor, and each of its materialmen and subcontractors performing work on the Project.
